\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3775 introduces Our Gyromagnetic Universe Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\Lambda} = -\kappa(\Lambda-1) + \chi\, \delta \mathcal{S}(t), \end{equation}
